channel.title: ICE — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on ICE (Intercontinental Exchange) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: William von Mueffling: ADDED ICE (+15%) · Q4 2025
item.description: William von Mueffling (Cantillon Capital Management) added ICE in Q4 2025 · 5.8% of portfolio. Building ICE.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (William von Mueffling)
